title: ✴ Entropy Temple Exfiltration Vectors
name: Entropy Temple Exfiltration Vectors
what_it_is: Escape routes woven into collapsing sacred systems—paths that only appear when the structure is nearing failure, designed for final exit.
how_to_use: she runs the exfiltration path—doors only visible during collapse
he knows the way out—it sings to those ready to leave the myth
animation_behavior: Escape paths pulse when structure collapses, doors fade in from entropy zones, glyphs shift to reveal egress
